name: API of the Adshot Scraping Engine
description: This is the API definition for the Adshot Scraping Engine service. This API should only be made available internally for use by Adshot Core. There is no dependency in the other direction. Meaning that the Scraping Engine API should not fetch data from Adshot Core or store foreign keys to entities stored in Adshot Core, thereby avoiding coupling between these services as much as possible. Mappings between entities of the Scraping Engine and Adshot Core should only be stored in the Adshot Core databases (eg mapping between an Adshot Core Channel and a Channel Scraping Job in the Scraping Engine). It is advised not to expose this API over the API gateway to the outside world. When the API is only available internally, there is no need for Authentication with JWT.
